response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with nearly two decades of software experience, solid TypeScript/Node depth, and recent, genuinely relevant exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans roughly one year; the resume shows no Python, no vector database or RAG work, no evaluation/observability pipelines for AI systems, and only light cloud-platform evidence (AWS CDK in a pricing context). For a staff-level GenAI forward-deployed role, the gap on core required qualifications is too wide despite his engineering craftsmanship and mentoring credentials.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to the role's key technologies
Deep general engineering breadth (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput microservices) with strong TDD/craftsmanship practices
Proven mentoring and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, conference talks) suited to customer-facing technical leadership
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python proficiency
Limited demonstrated experience designing AI systems on major cloud platforms or building data pipelines for unstructured data

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG, vector DB, and Python skills
Relevant MCP and agentic-tooling work plus strong engineering fundamentals
